summary: Frontend testing completed for Visit Form optimization with 5-page navigation. All features working correctly - lazy loading, DebouncedInput, and page navigation perform well with no lag detected.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visit form refactored into 5 separate pages with lazy loading. All pages load correctly and navigation works both via numbered buttons (1-5) and Anterior/Siguiente buttons. DebouncedInput component prevents re-renders and typing performance is excellent.

visit_form_opening.details: Form opens correctly from Visor de Actualización after selecting a predio and clicking 'Registrar Visita'

page_1_datos_visita.details: Section 1 (DATOS DE LA VISITA) and Section 2 (INFORMACIÓN BÁSICA DEL PREDIO) display correctly. DebouncedInput for 'Persona que Atiende' works without lag - typed 27 characters in 0.93s

page_2_propietarios.details: Section 5 (INFORMACIÓN JURÍDICA Y PROPIETARIOS) and Section 6 (DATOS DE NOTIFICACIÓN) display correctly. Propietarios list with add/remove functionality visible

page_3_construcciones.details: Section 7 (INFORMACIÓN DE CONSTRUCCIONES) table with 5 units (A-E) and Section 8 (CALIFICACIÓN) with structure/acabados fields display correctly

page_4_areas_terreno.details: Section 9 (RESUMEN ÁREAS DE TERRENO) and Section 10 (INFORMACIÓN DE LOCALIZACIÓN) display correctly

page_5_firmas_observaciones.details: Section 11 (COORDENADAS GPS), Section 12 (OBSERVACIONES), and Section 13 (FIRMAS) display correctly with GPS capture button and signature areas

direct_page_navigation.details: Numbered buttons (1-5) at bottom of form allow direct navigation between pages. Tested navigation 1→3→1→2→5 successfully

sequential_navigation.details: Anterior/Siguiente buttons work correctly for sequential page navigation

input_performance.details: DebouncedInput component prevents re-renders. Typing 27 characters took 0.93s (expected ~0.81s) - no significant lag detected

lazy_loading.details: Pages load with Suspense fallback (loading spinner) and lazy-loaded components render correctly

code_review.VisitaFormContainer.jsx: Well-structured container with React.memo, lazy loading via React.lazy/Suspense, and memoized navigation handlers
code_review.VisitaPagina1.jsx: Uses DebouncedInput for text fields, React.memo for component, useCallback for handlers
code_review.VisitaPagina2.jsx: Propietarios management with DebouncedInput for notification fields
code_review.VisitaPagina3.jsx: Custom DebouncedTableInput for construction table inputs with local state management
code_review.DebouncedInput.jsx: Clean implementation with 150ms debounce, uppercase option, and proper state synchronization
